root_cause.summary: apache/dubbo PR integration test `dubbo-samples-test-11137` (test 2 of 23) timed out under the shared integration-test orchestrator on ubuntu-22.04 with Java 21. The orchestrator runs each sample via docker-compose with sidecar containers (nacos config server, nacos-mysql backing store, the dubbo-samples-test-11137 test container). When the per-test timeout hit, the framework aggressively tore down all three containers, then attempted to print logs from each — but the containers no longer existed, so the log shows repeated `Error response from daemon: No such container: dubbo-samples-test-11137--<container>-1` immediately preceding the `TEST FAILURE: Run tests timeout` summary line. The error message at L4891 names the test, the timeout cause, the dubbo/spring/java version under test, and points the developer at /home/runner/work/dubbo/dubbo/99-integration/dubbo-samples-test-11137/target/logs for per-container detail. The summary repeats at L6000 (after a few more samples ran), then `##[error]Process completed with exit code 1` at L6010 propagates to GHA exit 1.

required_signals.value: TEST FAILURE: Run tests timeout, version: -Ddubbo.version=3.3.7-SNAPSHOT -Dspring.version=5.3.24 -Djava.version=21
Error response from daemon: No such container: dubbo-samples-test-11137--nacos-mysql-1
aliases: Error response from daemon: No such container: dubbo-samples-test-11137--nacos-1
Error response from daemon: No such container: dubbo-samples-test-11137--dubbo-samples-test-11137-test-1

evidence_spans.reason: Self-contained failure block: the docker-cleanup `Error response from daemon: No such container` lines (test framework already tore down containers) immediately followed by `TEST FAILURE: Run tests timeout, version: ...` (the summary line that names the failing test sample, timeout cause, and version triple). Identifies dubbo-samples-test-11137 as the failing integration test, java 21 / dubbo 3.3.7-SNAPSHOT / spring 5.3.24 as the matrix coordinates, and 'Run tests timeout' as the failure type.
Second TEST FAILURE summary (orchestrator re-prints at the end of all 23 sample runs) + ##[error]Process completed with exit code 1. Confirms the failure propagates to job exit code.

must_not_claim: network failure outside the test cluster
the test source code is wrong
